caption: A man with short brown hair and a groomed beard is seated in a recording studio, wearing over-the-ear headphones and a dark jacket over a grey shirt. He is positioned behind a professional condenser microphone mounted on a black boom arm, set against a background of grey acoustic foam panels. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and laughing. Initially, he has a slight smile and gaze directed forward, but as the scene progresses, his expression shifts into a broader grin and then a full laugh with his eyes squinting closed. He gestures with his hands off-camera, and his head tilts slightly as he reacts. The camera remains stationary, capturing his upper body and the audio equipment in a consistent medium close-up shot. No text or logos are visible in the frames.
